description_long: This chair features a contoured seat and backrest made from molded wood with a natural grain finish, giving it a mid-century modern aesthetic. The seat and backrest are both gently curved for ergonomic comfort, with the backrest attached to the frame by visible black metal supports. The frame consists of four slender, tubular black metal legs, providing stability and a minimalist look. The rear view reveals a pair of horizontal metal rods securing the backrest, adding structural integrity and a subtle industrial touch. The overall design is sleek and functional, suitable for both casual and formal urban settings. The chair lacks armrests, emphasizing its streamlined silhouette and versatility.
description: A mid-century modern chair with a curved wooden seat and backrest, supported by a minimalist black metal frame. The design is sleek, ergonomic, and suitable for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view shows the broad, curved wooden seat and backrest, with slender black metal legs visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the ergonomic curvature of the seat and backrest, and the thin profile of the metal frame.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the backrest's attachment with two horizontal black metal rods and the full width of the backrest.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again emphasizes the seat's curvature and the open, armless design.
